rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.056 governs educator certification procedures. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 21.056. ADDITIONAL CERTIFICATION. The board by rule shall provide for a certified educator to qualify for additional certification to teach at a grade level or in a subject area not covered by the educator's certificate upon satisfactory completion of an examination or other assessment of the educator's qualification.
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
